name: Italian-Style Lamb Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from chops and discard. Rinse chops and place in a heavy plastic food bag. Add wine, onion, soy sauce, lemon juice, sugar, oregano, and thyme. Seal the bag; rotate to mix ingredients well. Chill for at least 30 minutes or up to 6 hours, turning occasionally.
2. Lift out chops, draining. Reserve marinade. Place chops on a lightly oiled rack over a broiler pan. Broil chops about 6 inches from the heat, basting several times with marinade. Turn chops once to brown evenly and cook until done to your taste. For medium-rare (still pink in the center; cut to test), allow 8-10 minutes. Transfer chops to a warm platter and sprinkle with parsley.
